CREATE TABLE regions (id UInt32, region_name String);
CREATE TABLE continents (continent_id UInt32, continent_name String);
SELECT regionToContinent(id) AS continent_id FROM regions WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3, 4);
SELECT regionToContinent(id) AS continent_id, region_name FROM regions WHERE id = 2;
SELECT regionToContinent(id) AS continent_id FROM (SELECT id FROM regions WHERE id < 10);
SELECT a.region_name, b.continent_id, b.continent_name FROM regions AS a JOIN continents AS b ON regionToContinent(a.id) = b.continent_id WHERE a.id = 3;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_regions, SUM(regionToContinent(id)) AS total_continent_ids FROM regions GROUP BY region_name;
SELECT DISTINCT regionToContinent(id) AS continent_id FROM regions ORDER BY continent_id DESC;
SELECT regionToContinent(id) AS continent_id FROM regions WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM regions);
SELECT a.region_name, regionToContinent(b.id) AS continent_id FROM regions AS a CROSS JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT id FROM regions) AS b;
SELECT regionToContinent(1) AS continent_id, regionToName(1, 'en') AS region_name FROM numbers(1);
SELECT regionToContinent(id) AS continent_id FROM regions HAVING continent_id IS NOT NULL;
